title: athyrium marginale
intro: Athyrium marginale, also known as the Lady fern or Maiden's hair fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Athyrium genus of ferns. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The leaves of the Lady fern have been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, and have also been used as a remedy for respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Athyrium marginale can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and support overall well-being.
